name: Charles Laughton
abstract: Charles Laughton (; 1 July 1899 – 15 December 1962) was an English actor and director. Over his career he received an Academy Award and a Grammy Award as well as nominations for two BAFTAs and a Golden Globe.

works.t: Man and Superman: Act 3, Scene 2. Don Juan in Hell

about_quotes.speaker: Curtis Fuller
about_quotes.evidence: One of the first actors played with Charles Laughton and all those people.
about_quotes.doc_title: Curtis Fuller — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
